name: Dryad Battler
description:
From The Battle Bricks

"Solitude is sometimes good - there's room to grow and to breathe."

Felt like making this one. She's also old and kind. Have fun. No red and blue team, just peace and harmony.. unless you decide to show up as an enemy..!

By the way, this Dryad Battler is 35 physically. She's a lot older than that... I think
